text.title: Team Morale Pulse Survey Procedure
text.summary: Five-step weekly procedure: launch → collect → aggregate → alert → action. Each step gates the next via observable signals.

step.name: launch
step.action: Post survey link with the no-retaliation statement. Note team_size + sprint_id + week_iso.
step.decision-gate: If PM cannot guarantee 48h action SLA for the week, do NOT launch (pause per r4).

step.name: collect
step.action: Tally responses_received; compute response_rate. Stop collecting at end of business day Wednesday so Thursday can aggregate.

step.name: aggregate
step.action: Run `scripts/aggregate-pulse.py` (or equivalent). Compute eNPS as `promoter_pct - detractor_pct`. Compute mean + median for workload/autonomy/clarity. Set `anonymity_threshold_met = (responses_received >= 3 AND response_rate >= 0.6)`.
step.decision-gate: If `anonymity_threshold_met == false`: suppress per-axis medians, publish only response counts.

step.name: alert
step.action: Evaluate alert rules: (a) eNPS_drop > 20 vs prior, (b) any axis median < 6, (c) response_rate < 0.5. For each trigger emit an alert with `due_by = trigger + 48 business hours` and `responsible_pm` filled.

step.name: action
step.action: PM books 1:1s with every team member before `due_by`. Output a follow-up note (PM-private) within 5 days. If 1:1s cannot happen, pause survey per r4.
step.output: 1:1 completion log + decision: continue weekly / pause / change cadence
step.decision-gate: If pause > 1 week, run `scripts/validate-team-morale-pulse-survey.py` against the last `MoralePulse` and document why before resumption.
